message.content:
@startuml
participant :读者 as :Reader
participant :图书管理员 as :Librarian
participant :还书界面 as :ReturnInterface
participant :还书信息 as :ReturnInfo
participant :系统 as :System

loop 取消预定
    :Reader -> :Librarian: 1.取消预定
    :Librarian -> :ReturnInterface: 2.处理图书
    :ReturnInterface -> :ReturnInfo: 3.获取图书信息
    :ReturnInfo -> :ReturnInterface: 4.图书信息
    :ReturnInterface -> :System: 5.删除预定记录
    :System -> :ReturnInterface: 6.删除预定记录
    :ReturnInterface -> :Librarian: 7.删除预定成功
    :Librarian -> :Reader: 8.处理图成功
    :Librarian -> :Reader: 9.取消预定成功

@enduml
